DAVIS, FAILED TO APPEAR. JUDGMENT AFTER TRIAL BY COURT WAS ISSUED IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY.

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CHARLES L

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, CHARLES L THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 330 CLELMENTINA STREET #207 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $360.40 RENT, $6.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $367.20, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC RENT DUE IS ONLY FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $360.40.
